generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands to motor voltage commands for autonomous vehicle propulsion within the Physical Twin Entity."
]

instance SteeringServoActuationFE : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Implements steering servo actuation commands for autonomous vehicle direction control within the Physical Twin Entity."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-resolution 2D LiDAR sensor providing point cloud data for environmental perception."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LidarPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "RGB-D depth camera providing visual and depth data for object detection and scene understanding."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CameraVisualData
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures and reports real-time vehicle speed data for state monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures and reports real-time steering angle data for vehicle orientation tracking."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance LidarPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance CameraVisualData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated vehicle state data including speed and steering angle."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData, SteeringAngleData
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance DBSCANPointCloudClusterer : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm implementation for point cloud clustering and noise removal in environmental perception."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanObjectTracker : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter implementation for object tracking and state estimation in environmental perception."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrackingEnabler
]

instance ISO15622ACCController : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant Adaptive Cruise Control logic (Performance Class I) for speed adjustment and emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing vehicle state data including speed, steering angle, and timestamped records."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackDatabase : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "SQL database storing object tracks and detection history for post-processing analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProcessedObjectData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler
]

instance TimeseriesReportData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured timeseries data containing vehicle state and object track information for reporting."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProcessedObjectData, VehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportGenerationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance PointCloudProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based processing pipeline for LiDAR point cloud data using DBSCAN clustering."
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringService
]

instance TrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based processing pipeline for object tracking using Kalman filter algorithms."
    DTDFVocab:enables ObjectTrackingService
]

instance ControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based implementation of ISO 15622 ACC control logic for speed adjustment and emergency braking."
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlService
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database management system for storing vehicle state data and object tracks."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ReportGenerationService
]

instance DataCollectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based data collection pipeline for transmitting physical sensor data to virtual twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based interface for remote enabling/disabling of ACC system and parameter adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D visualization engine for displaying vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, VisualizationService
]

instance ReportGenerationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based report generation system creating human-readable timeseries reports."
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

// C6: Services
instance PointCloudClusteringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time processing service for clustering LiDAR point clouds using DBSCAN algorithm."
    DTDFVocab:provides ProcessedPointCloudInsight
]

instance ObjectTrackingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time object tracking service using Kalman filter for maintaining object state estimates."
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTrackInsight
]

instance ACCControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control system implementing ISO 15622 Performance Class I logic."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCDecisionAction
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization service for operators to monitor vehicle state and object tracks."
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateInsight, ObjectTrackInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management interface for enabling/disabling ACC and setting operational parameters."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCConfigurationAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D environment visualization service displaying vehicle state and projected path."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnvironmentVisualizationInsight
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Human-readable report generation service for developer troubleshooting and analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides TroubleshootingReportInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance ProcessedPointCloudInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Processed and clustered point cloud data for environmental perception analysis."
]

instance ObjectTrackInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Maintained object tracks and state estimates for collision avoidance analysis."
]

instance VehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle state data including speed, steering angle, and operational status."
]

instance EnvironmentVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of the vehicle's environment including detected objects and path projection."
]

instance ACCDecisionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic speed adjustment and emergency braking commands based on lead vehicle distance."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCConfigurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote configuration of ACC system parameters including desired speed and emergency braking thresholds."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TroubleshootingReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable report containing timeseries data for developer troubleshooting of ACC system."
]

// C12: Physical Twin Entity
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical twin entity containing all actuation and sensing components of the autonomous vehicle."
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera,
                  VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor,
                  MotorActuationFE, SteeringServoActuationFE
]

// C13: Digital Twin Entity
instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital twin entity containing all virtual processing components and models."
    base:contains DBSCANPointCloudClusterer, KalmanObjectTracker,
                  ISO15622ACCController, VehicleStateDatabase,
                  ObjectTrackDatabase, TimeseriesReportData,
                  PointCloudProcessingEnabler, TrackingEnabler,
                  ControlEnabler, DataStorageEnabler,
                  DataCollectionEnabler, RemoteManagementEnabler,
                  VisualizationEnabler, ReportGenerationEnabler,
                  PointCloudClusteringService, ObjectTrackingService,
                  ACCControlService, DataMonitoringService,
                  RemoteManagementService, VisualizationService,
                  ReportGenerationService
]

// C14: User Entity
instance OperatorUser : DTDFVocab:User [
    base:desc "Human operator entity with access to real-time monitoring and visualization services."
    DTDFVocab:hasAccessTo DataMonitoringService, VisualizationService
]

instance DeveloperUser : DTDFVocab:User [
    base:desc "Developer entity with access to troubleshooting reports and configuration services."
    DTDFVocab:hasAccessTo ReportGenerationService, RemoteManagementService
]

// C15: Cross-System Entity
instance ROS2CommunicationBus : DTDFVocab:CommunicationSystem [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware enabling communication between physical components and digital twin services."
    DTDFVocab:connects PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:HardwareSystem [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer hosting ROS2 nodes and processing pipeline."
    DTDFVocab:hosts DataCollectionEnabler, PointCloudProcessingEnabler,
                   TrackingEnabler, ControlEnabler, VisualizationEnabler
]

instance SQLDatabaseServer : DTDFVocab:HardwareSystem [
    base:desc "Cloud-hosted SQL database server storing vehicle state and object track data."
    DTDFVocab:hosts DataStorageEnabler
]

// C16: Environment Components
instance AutonomousVehicleChassis : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical chassis of the 1/10-scale autonomous vehicle containing lower and upper mounting platforms."
    base:contains LowerLevelChassisComponent, UpperLevelChassisComponent
]

instance LowerLevelChassisComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lower chassis component containing steering and speed control mechanisms."
    base:isContainedIn AutonomousVehicleChassis
]

instance UpperLevelChassisComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Upper chassis component mounting autonomy components including Jetson Orin Nano and sensors."
    base:isContainedIn AutonomousVehicleChassis
]

instance AutonomyComponentsMount : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Mounting platform for autonomy-related hardware including LiDAR, camera, and microcomputer."
    base:isContainedIn UpperLevelChassisComponent
]

// C18: Data Flow Connections
instance ProcessedObjectData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object detection data combining point cloud clustering and tracking results."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProcessedPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrackingEnabler, ControlEnabler
]

instance ProcessedPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed point cloud data after DBSCAN clustering for environmental perception."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LidarPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudProcessingEnabler
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCommand : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Automatic emergency braking command generated by ACC control logic."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ACCDecisionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SteeringServoActuationFE, MotorActuationFE
]

instance ACCDecisionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Speed adjustment commands generated by ISO 15622 ACC controller."
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData, ObjectTrackData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Tracked object state data from Kalman filter processing."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProcessedObjectData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals from DT to PT including desired speed commands (converted to motor voltage via Actuation FE), emergency braking commands, and ACC enable/disable commands through the Control Panel UI, with latency ≤100 ms."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with end-to-end latency ≤100 ms (per R7) and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms (per R8), as required for safety-critical ACC system compliance with 3GPP Technical Specification 22.185 for V2V communication."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated entities: Physical Twin Entity (sensors/actuators), Digital Twin Entity (ACC, Data Collection), User Entity (3D Visualization, Control Panel), Cross-System Entity (Data Translation); ROS2 for intra-entity communication, Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication, with Data Translation FE handling serialization and unit conversions."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "During vehicle operation (as operated) for optimization and health monitoring; the case study focuses on operational phase with ACC system implementation, though DTs in automotive are also used in design phase for experimentation and validation."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 network for intra-vehicle communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; Data Translation FE handles serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversions; latency ≤100 ms per R7."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on vehicle-mounted Jetson Orin Nano; Digital Twin Entity (ACC, Data Storage) hosted in cloud; User Entity deployed on remote machines for operator access."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture adapted for automotive DTs; ACC implementation compliant to ISO 15622 standard for performance class I (no road curvature capabilities)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical system with ACC implementation compliant to ISO 15622; latency and clock synchronization requirements address safety aspects; no specific security protocols (e.g., encryption, authentication) detailed in the document."
]
